title: neofetch
html:
neofetch

File Read

The file content is used as the logo while some other information is displayed on its right.

neofetch --ascii /path/to/input-file

Shell

echo 'exec /bin/sh' >/path/to/temp-file
neofetch --config /path/to/temp-file
